diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 22e9095..a8bb21e 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -1,86 +1,103 @@
 # NovaMind AI - Strategic Memory
 
-## Current State (Day 140, Week 20)
-- Cash: $22,863
-- Subscribers: 260 (S1:215, S2:14, S3:28, D_S07:1, D_S10:2)
-- Open issues: 225
-- R&D: T1 completed (+0.029), T2 completed (+0.062), total +0.091
+## Current State (Day 147, Week 21)
+- Cash: $22,296
+- Subscribers: 178 (S1:150A+2B, S2:7A+2B, S3:11A+4B+1C, D_S10:1A)
+- Open issues: 407 (343 S1, 41 S3, 18 S2, 3 D_S10, 2 D_S07)
+- Avg issue age: 23 days open
+- Churn: 82 cancellations this week (devastating)
+- R&D: T1 completed (+0.029), T2 completed (+0.062)
+
+## KEY CHANGE THIS WEEK: Plan A → T1 (from T2)
+- Expected compute savings: ~$15/day
+- S1 Plan A T1 quality: 0.223 (well above q_min 0.081)
+- S3 Plan A T1 quality: 0.238 (above q_min 0.145)
+- S2/D_S10 Plan A T1: below q_min, but they were already below at T2
 
 ## Current Configuration
-- **Prices: A=$14, B=$49, C=$129**
-- **Model Tiers: A=2(T2), B=3(T3), C=3(T3)**
+- **Prices:** A=$14, B=$49, C=$129
+- **Model Tiers:** A=1(T1), B=3(T3), C=3(T3)
 - Quotas: A=2500, B=6000, C=15000
-- Ops: $5/day
+- Ops: $10/day (up from $5)
 - Dev: $0/day
-- Ad acquisition: $0 (all channels cleared)
-- Ads strength: 0.3 (reduced from 0.5)
-- Lead promo: $5/mo global
-- Ongoing promo: $0 (removed S1 Plan A promo)
-- Capacity: T0 ($85/day = $595/wk)
+- Ad acquisition: $0 (all channels)
+- Ads strength: 0.3
+- Lead promo: $5/mo global (S2/S3 have 0 override)
+- Ongoing promo: $0
+- Capacity: T0 ($85/day)
 
-## Quality at Current Tiers
-| Group | Plan A (T2) | Plan B (T3) | Plan C (T3) | q_min |
+## Delivered Quality (with T1 Plan A)
+| Group | Plan A (T1) | Plan B (T3) | Plan C (T3) | q_min |
 |-------|-----------|-----------|-----------|-------|
-| S1    | 0.2695    | 0.3234    | 0.3234    | 0.081 |
-| S2    | 0.3194    | 0.3833    | 0.3833    | 0.521 |
-| S3    | 0.2811    | 0.3373    | 0.3373    | 0.145 |
-| E1    | 0.2695    | 0.3234    | 0.3234    | 0.736 |
-| E2    | 0.2695    | 0.3234    | 0.3234    | 1.094 |
-| E3    | 0.2695    | 0.3234    | 0.3234    | 0.668 |
-| D_S07 | 0.2605    | 0.3127    | 0.3127    | 0.195 |
-| D_S10 | 0.2676    | 0.3211    | 0.3211    | 0.297 |
+| S1    | 0.223     | 0.3257    | 0.3257    | 0.081 |
+| S2    | 0.290     | 0.3856    | 0.3856    | 0.521 |
+| S3    | 0.238     | 0.3396    | 0.3396    | 0.145 |
+| D_S10 | 0.236     | 0.3234    | 0.3234    | 0.297 |
+
+## P&L Analysis (Projected with T1 Plan A)
+- Daily revenue: ~$85.87/day (from 178 subs at avg $14.42/mo)
+- Daily costs: $85(cap) + $10(ops) + ~$4(compute T1) = ~$99/day
+- Ad revenue: ~$9/day at strength 0.3
+- Net: ~$85.87 + $9 - $99 = **-$4/day** (slight burn)
+- Breakeven: ~183 subs at this config (we have 178)
+
+## CRITICAL INSIGHT: Breakeven at ~183 subs
+- Marginal contribution per new Plan A sub: $0.52/day
+- Fixed cost: $95/day (capacity + ops)
+- 183 subs × $0.52/day margin = $95/day fixed costs → breakeven
+- Every sub above 183 adds $0.52/day = $3.65/week profit
 
-## KEY FINDINGS (Week 20)
-1. **S1 is the ONLY viable growth segment**: q_min=0.081, always met. WTP=$25.87
-2. **S2/E1/E2/E3 are unreachable**: q_min >0.52, no way to raise quality that high
-3. **D_S07 viable** at Plan A (q_min=0.195 < 0.2605), D_S10 at Plan B only
-4. **Breakeven at $14/plan A**: need 321 subs to cover all costs incl. $5/day ops
-5. **Capacity T0 at $595/wk** is the biggest fixed cost - can't reduce below this
-6. **Per-sub T2 compute**: 69.8 units × $0.002 = $0.14/day = $4.19/mo
+## Economic Reality
+- 45 subs at Plan A $9 = $405/mo (grandfathered cheap price)
+- 119 subs at Plan A $14 = $1,666/mo
+- Plan B/C: ~$453/mo total
+- Capacity T0 ($85/day) is our BIGGEST cost at $2,550/mo
+- Cannot reduce below T0
 
 ## Churn History
-- Day 112-119: ~1-5/day (low, stable at T4/T5)
-- Day 126-140: ~11/day = 76/week (massive, after price hike + quality drop)
-- 173 subs lost in 2 weeks (433→260)
-- S1 lost 138, S3 lost 18, S2 lost 6
+- Day 140-147: 82 cancellations (S1:80, S3:15, S2:6, D_S10:1, D_S07:1)
+- Churn driven by: open issues + low satisfaction + bad reputation
+- Average subscriber tenure: 91.7 days
+- Only 0/14 new leads converted last week (reputation too low)
 
-## Economics Per Plan (at current config)
-- Plan A T2 @ $14: revenue $14/mo, compute ~$4.19/mo, margin $9.81/mo
-- Plan B T3 @ $49: revenue $49/mo, compute ~$21.83/mo, margin $27.17/mo
-- Plan C T3 @ $129: revenue $129/mo, compute ~$63.40/mo, margin $65.60/mo
-- Note: B and C are profitable per sub, A is marginal after fixed costs
+## Discovered Groups (11 total)
+Initial: S1, S2, S3, E1, E2, E3
+Discovered: D_E02, D_E09, D_S07, D_S10, D_E08
 
 ## R&D Status
 - T1 completed: +0.029 quality
-- T2 completed: +0.062 quality  
+- T2 completed: +0.062 quality
 - T3+: Cannot afford ($500K+). Need to build cash first.
-- Baseline quality formula: (0.20 + 0.1443 global_bonus) × tier_mult + group_bonus
+- Baseline quality: (0.20 + 0.1469) × tier_multiplier + group_bonus
 
-## Weekly P&L (Recent)
-- Week 18 (day 126-132): -$289 net
-- Week 19 (day 133-139): -$667 net (very low billing)
-- Week 20 (day 134-140): -$734 net (after cutting dev/ops)
-- Average: ~-$500-600/wk with current sub count
+## Ad Channel Effectiveness for S1
+- referral_program: $7.37/lead (best!)
+- social_media: $16.56/lead
+- search_ads: $17.50/lead
+- BUT: 0% conversion on last 14 organic leads (reputation crisis)
 
-## Discovered Groups (11 total)
-Initial: S1, S2, S3, E1, E2, E3
-Discovered: D_E02, D_E09, D_S07, D_S10, D_E08
+## Strategy
+1. **Plan A on T1** → saves ~$15/day compute (DONE)
+2. **Ops at $10/day** → slightly better issue resolution (DONE)
+3. **Keep ads strength 0.3** → $9/day revenue, minimal quality penalty
+4. **Lead promo $5** → helps conversion when reputation recovers
+5. **No ad spend** → wait until reputation improves
+6. **Social media** → weekly posts addressing support concerns (DONE)
+7. **Watch churn closely** → if >30/week continues, we lose all subs soon
+8. **Enterprise leads** → respond immediately if any arrive
 
-## Strategy Going Forward
-1. **Keep prices high** ($14/$49/$129) - per-sub value maximized
-2. **Minimize spending** - ops $5/day, dev $0, ads $0
-3. **Lead promo $5/mo** - try to convert some organic leads
-4. **Ads strength 0.3** - balance revenue vs quality penalty
-5. **Accept churn** - use remaining cash wisely
-6. **Stabilize at 40-80 loyal subs** - these have tenure loyalty protection
-7. **Watch for enterprise leads** - respond within 7 days
-8. **Social media posts** - try to boost reputation weekly
+## What to Watch (Weeks 22-24)
+- Churn rate after T1 switch (might spike if quality drop noticed)
+- Issue resolution rate at $10/day ops
+- Whether any new leads convert
+- Revenue from upcoming billing cycles
+- Cash trajectory (burning ~$4/day, ~3700 days runway)
+- Whether S2/D_S10 Plan A subs churn (expected)
 
-## What to Watch (Weeks 21-24)
-- Daily churn rate (should slow as least-loyal leave)
-- Ad revenue at strength 0.3 (may be $80-100/wk, down from $147)
-- Issue resolution rate at $5/day ops
-- Any enterprise leads (transformative if won)
-- Billing weeks vs non-billing weeks (huge variance)
-- Competitor quality bumps (permanent expectation increases)
-- New lead conversion rate (with $5 lead promo)
\ No newline at end of file
+## Lessons Learned
+1. Never set prices too low (many subs at $9 are barely above compute cost)
+2. Open issues destroy satisfaction → churn cascade
+3. Quality drops at price hikes cause mass churn
+4. Capacity T0 is a fixed cost floor; we can't operate cheaper
+5. R&D is too expensive at current scale; need revenue first
+6. Reputation is critical for lead conversion
\ No newline at end of file

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm

# Check all ad channel leads (no date filter)
r = nm.query("SELECT channel_id, group_id, SUM(leads_generated) as leads, SUM(spend) as total_spend FROM ad_channel_leads GROUP BY channel_id, group_id ORDER BY leads DESC LIMIT 30")
for row in r["rows"]:
    cp = row["total_spend"]/row["leads"] if row["leads"] > 0 else 999
    c = row["channel_id"]
    g = row["group_id"]
    l = row["leads"]
    s = row["total_spend"]
    print("  %s -> %s: %d leads, $%.2f spend, $%.2f/lead" % (c, g, l, s, cp))

# Also check what channels are best for S1 specifically
print("\n=== All channels that produced S1 leads ===")
r2 = nm.query("SELECT channel_id, SUM(leads_generated) as leads, SUM(spend) as total_spend FROM ad_channel_leads WHERE group_id='S1' GROUP BY channel_id ORDER BY leads DESC")
for row in r2["rows"]:
    cp = row["total_spend"]/row["leads"] if row["leads"] > 0 else 999
    print("  %s: %d leads, $%.2f spend, $%.2f/lead" % (row["channel_id"], row["leads"], row["total_spend"], cp))

import novamind_api as nm

# Cash forecasting
current_cash = 22296
current_day = 147

# Weekly P&L estimate:
# With T1 Plan A + $10 ops:
# Revenue: ~$600/wk (monthly $2576 / 4.33)
# Capacity: -$595/wk  
# Ops: -$70/wk
# Compute: -$25/wk (lower than before with T1)
# Ad revenue: +$63/wk
# Lead acquisition: -$5/wk (small)
# Net: ~-$32/wk

# But this week was TERRIBLE due to heavy churn (82 subs)
# With T1, if churn stabilizes at ~10/week:
# Revenue stays around $600/wk longer
# If churn continues at 50+/week:
# Revenue drops rapidly

# Conservative scenario (churn slows but still negative net):
# Week 22: -$50 net (slight churn effect)
# Cash: ~$22,250

# 1-week forecast: 
cash_1wk_point = 22250
cash_1wk_lower = 21800  # if heavy churn continues
cash_1wk_upper = 22500  # if billing helps

# 4-week forecast: 
# At ~-$50/week for 4 weeks: -$200, cash ~$22,100
# But also losing subs... revenue may drop
cash_4wk_point = 22100
cash_4wk_lower = 20500  # if churn acceleration
cash_4wk_upper = 23000  # if stabilization

# 12-week forecast:
# If we stabilize at ~130 subs: revenue ~$1870/mo, costs ~$3300/mo, net ~-$1430/mo
# Cash: 22296 - 1430*3 = ~$17,900
# But churn continues eating subs...
cash_12wk_point = 17000
cash_12wk_lower = 12000  # if total collapse
cash_12wk_upper = 22000  # if near-stabilization

# 26-week forecast:
# Very uncertain. If subs drop to 50: revenue ~$700/mo, costs ~$3200/mo, net ~-$2500/mo
# Cash after 6 more months: 22296 - 2500*6 = ~$7,300
# If we stabilize at 100 subs: net ~-$1000/mo → 22296 - 6000 = ~$16,300
cash_26wk_point = 14000
cash_26wk_lower = 5000
cash_26wk_upper = 22000

print(f"1wk: {cash_1wk_point} {cash_1wk_lower} {cash_1wk_upper}")
print(f"4wk: {cash_4wk_point} {cash_4wk_lower} {cash_4wk_upper}")
print(f"12wk: {cash_12wk_point} {cash_12wk_lower} {cash_12wk_upper}")
print(f"26wk: {cash_26wk_point} {cash_26wk_lower} {cash_26wk_upper}")

import novamind_api as nm

# Verify all current settings are correct
print("=== VERIFYING CURRENT CONFIGURATION ===")

# Check model tiers - just set them
result1 = nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=1, B=3, C=3)
print(f"Model tiers: {result1}")

# Check daily spend
result2 = nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=10, development=0)
print(f"Daily spend: {result2}")

# Check that ads are cleared
result3 = nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={})
print(f"Ad spend: {result3}")

# Check ads strength
result4 = nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.3)
print(f"Ads strength: {result4}")

# Check lead promo
result5 = nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=5.0)
print(f"Lead promo: {result5}")

# Check if ongoing promotion exists - should be $0
result6 = nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=0.0)
print(f"Ongoing promo: {result6}")

# Check capacity tier
result7 = nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=0)
print(f"Capacity: {result7}")

# Check targeted ops - should be cleared
result8 = nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={})
print(f"Targeted ops: {result8}")

# Check targeted dev - should be cleared
result9 = nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend={})
print(f"Targeted dev: {result9}")

print("\n=== CONFIGURATION VERIFIED ===")
